name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Building scalable backend services and full-stack solutions with expertise in Python, Node.js, and modern web technologies.
about:
Tushar Jain is an aspiring Software Developer with a Bachelor of Technology in Electronics and Communication Engineering. He possesses strong full-stack development skills, specializing in backend services using Node.js and Python, and has experience with modern web frameworks like React and Next.js. His work includes architecting scalable systems, building microservices, designing database schemas, and implementing CI/CD pipelines. Tushar has also contributed to AI/ML initiatives, demonstrating a diverse skill set in software development and a commitment to high-quality, efficient solutions.

highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS and Python-based microservices.
Designed and implemented REST APIs and database schemas using Node.js and MongoDB.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability and system stability.
Strengthened security protocols for a chat messaging system, resulting in zero data breaches.
Optimized API performance and frontend-backend integration for better system efficiency.
